사무엘하 9:1.content: David said, “Is there yet any who is left of Saul’s house, that I may show him kindness for Jonathan’s sake?”

사무엘하 9:2.content: There was of Saul’s house a servant whose name was Ziba, and they called him to David; and the king said to him, “Are you Ziba?” He said, “I am your servant.”

사무엘하 9:3.content: The king said, “Is there not yet any of Saul’s house, that I may show the kindness of God to him?” Ziba said to the king, “Jonathan still has a son, who is lame in his feet.”

사무엘하 9:4.content: The king said to him, “Where is he?” Ziba said to the king, “Behold, he is in the house of Machir the son of Ammiel, in Lo Debar.”

사무엘하 9:5.content: Then king David sent, and brought him out of the house of Machir the son of Ammiel, from Lo Debar.

사무엘하 9:6.content: Mephibosheth, the son of Jonathan, the son of Saul, came to David, and fell on his face, and showed respect. David said, “Mephibosheth.” He answered, “Behold, your servant!”

사무엘하 9:7.content: David said to him, “Don’t be afraid; for I will surely show you kindness for Jonathan your father’s sake, and will restore to you all the land of Saul your father. You will eat bread at my table continually.”

사무엘하 9:8.content: He bowed down, and said, “What is your servant, that you should look at such a dead dog as I am?”

사무엘하 9:9.content: Then the king called to Ziba, Saul’s servant, and said to him, “All that belonged to Saul and to all his house I have given to your master’s son.

사무엘하 9:10.content: Till the land for him, you, your sons, and your servants. Bring in the harvest, that your master’s son may have bread to eat; but Mephibosheth your master’s son will always eat bread at my table.” Now Ziba had fifteen sons and twenty servants.

사무엘하 9:11.content: Then Ziba said to the king, “According to all that my lord the king commands his servant, so your servant will do.” So Mephibosheth ate at the king’s table, like one of the king’s sons.

사무엘하 9:12.content: Mephibosheth had a young son, whose name was Mica. All that lived in Ziba’s house were servants to Mephibosheth.

사무엘하 9:13.content: So Mephibosheth lived in Jerusalem; for he ate continually at the king’s table. He was lame in both his feet.
